asset.name: Otis
asset.strongestIdea: Threshold-keeper Otis distilled into a premium, mobile-readable concierge sprite system.

identityLock: older soft Santa-adjacent concierge, not Santa
kind tired eyes with simple glasses
imperfect groomed white beard and hair
slight belly, relaxed uneven shoulders, natural older hands
simple matte materials and restrained brass

generationStrategy.sourcePolicy: Generate individual sprites, not seven-pose sheets.
expandOnlyAfter: native long edge is at least 4096 px
transparent alpha or extractable flat background passes preflight
hands, feet, beard, and props are uncropped
Otis remains recognizable at 96 CSS px tall
identity is stable between pilot images

outfitDirectives.regular: Burgundy concierge jacket or cardigan, ivory shirt, dark tailored trousers, restrained brass pin, optional small keycard or key ring.
outfitDirectives.formal: Deeper burgundy jacket, charcoal waistcoat, ivory shirt, one refined brass detail, polished dark shoes; ceremonial but never theatrical.
outfitDirectives.working: Burgundy knit layer with rolled sleeves or practical vest, ivory shirt, plain ledger or tablet, small keys; active but still premium.

poseDirectives.idle: Balanced stance, gentle weight shift, calm hands visible near midline.
poseDirectives.greeting: Low open-palm threshold invitation, other hand relaxed.
poseDirectives.listening: Slight forward lean, small ledger close, patient focus.
poseDirectives.thinking: Hand near chin or glasses, elbow close, no finger clutter.
poseDirectives.talking: Restrained chest-height explaining gesture, mouth slightly open.
poseDirectives.alert: Upright protective posture, keycard or keys held low, not alarmed.
poseDirectives.working: Ledger or tablet held clearly, eyes warm and prepared.

mustHave: one readable prop maximum per sprite

preflightRequirements.background: transparent RGBA preferred; flat temporary extraction background allowed only if uniform
edgeChecks: shoes and fingers are not clipped

promotionState.currentBlocker: No native high-resolution transparent source images were generated or preflighted in this lane.
